title: collococcus glaber
intro: Collococcus glaber, also known as the smooth collet, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to various parts of the world, including India and Africa. Collococcus glaber has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function.
